entry.title: IDC HSFE6015D0003 (P00022) awarded to COMPASS PTS JV, THE, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS: 1) TO CHANGE THE COR FROM CALVIN THOMAS TO SABLE BELL; THE CONTRACT SPECIALIST FROM KAREN SEBRO TO DORENE JACKSON, AND AND ADD THE COR APPOINTMENT LETTER. 2) ADD AND EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 5
ALL OTHER I

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: FAR 52.223-4 & BIO-BASED & ENERGY EFFICIENT & ENVIRONMENTALLY PREFERABLE
